name: Buddy History Context Loader
description: A deterministic Buddy runtime tool that loads conversation history from the current Buddy session runtime context and returns an auditable context_package.

inputSchema.name: User Message
inputSchema.description: Current user message, used only for audit metadata.

inputSchema.name: Max Messages
inputSchema.description: Maximum recent visible Buddy messages to reference.

outputSchema.name: Conversation History Package
outputSchema.description: context_package with session history source refs, budget metadata, warnings, and a nested context_assembly_ref for prompt rendering.

outputSchema.name: Current Session ID
outputSchema.description: Buddy session id resolved from runtime context.

outputSchema.name: Source Run ID
outputSchema.description: Run id available to the tool invocation context, when present.

outputSchema.name: History Context Report
outputSchema.description: Audit report describing runtime context, selected sources, and fallback mode.
